metadata.title: Note Toolbar
metadata.description: Add customizable toolbars to your notes.

regex.source: "error-old-settings-name":"\u26A0\uFE0F Error: Please disable and renable Note Toolbar, or restart Obsidian."
regex.target: "error-old-settings-name":"\u26A0\uFE0F 错误：请禁用并重新启用笔记工具栏，或重启 Obsidian。"

regex.source: "error-old-settings-description":"Old settings file loaded ({{oldVersion}}) but latest is {{currentVersion}}"
regex.target: "error-old-settings-description":"加载了旧设置文件（{{oldVersion}}），但最新版本为 {{currentVersion}}"

regex.source: description:"Define what happens when toolbars are converted to callouts."
regex.target: description:"定义工具栏转换为标注时的行为。"

regex.source: "option-icons-description":"Add icon placeholders to callouts. (Example: :LiHome:) The Iconize plugin must be installed and enabled to see icons. If disabled, tooltips will be used if labels are not set. Icons can be imported by other users."
regex.target: "option-icons-description":"向标注添加图标占位符。（示例：:LiHome:）必须安装并启用 Iconize 插件才能看到图标。如果禁用，标签未设置时将使用提示文字。图标可以由其他用户导入。"

regex.source: "option-vars-description":"Any variables used in the toolbar will be replaced with values from the note you're currently viewing. Example: {{note_title}} \u2192 My Note"
regex.target: "option-vars-description":"工具栏中使用的任何变量都将被当前查看的笔记中的值替换。示例：{{note_title}} → 我的笔记"

regex.source: "option-ids-description":"This ensures menu items still work for you if the menu toolbar's renamed. If you want to share callouts, turn this off, and the toolbar's name will be used instead."
regex.target: "option-ids-description":"这确保即使菜单工具栏重命名，菜单项仍然可以正常工作。如果你想共享标注，请关闭此选项，而工具栏的名称将被使用。"

regex.source: "option-data-description":"Data elements allow toolbars opened in new windows to still work. If disabled, Note Toolbar URIs will be used instead of data elements, and also provide cleaner-looking markdown."
regex.target: "option-data-description":"数据元素允许在新窗口中打开的工具栏仍然可以正常工作。如果禁用，Note Toolbar URIs 将被用来代替数据元素，并且还提供更整洁的 Markdown 代码。"

regex.source: "label-delete-confirm":"Are you sure you want to delete this toolbar?"
description:"Define which notes to display toolbars on, using a property, mappings, or both."
regex.target: description:"定义在哪种笔记上显示工具栏，使用属性、映射或两者结合。"

regex.source: "option-property-description":"If a toolbar name is found in this property, the toolbar will be displayed on the note. This takes precedence over any folder mappings. In a note, set this property to 'none' to hide the toolbar."
regex.target: "option-property-description":"如果在此属性中找到工具栏名称，工具栏将在笔记中显示。这优先于任何文件夹映射。在笔记中，将此属性设置为 'none' 以隐藏工具栏。"
title:"使用笔记工具栏的帮助 \u{1F6DF}"

regex.source: description:"Create context-aware toolbars for your notes."
regex.target: description:"为您的笔记创建上下文感知的工具栏。"

regex.source: "label-article-1-description":"Learn about the different types of items."
"label-article-2-description":"Learn how to create toolbars within your notes."
regex.target: "label-article-2-description":"学习如何在笔记中创建工具栏。"

regex.source: "label-bug-description":"Found a problem? Please log an issue in GitHub, or complete this Google form."
regex.target: "label-bug-description":"发现问题了吗？请在 GitHub 上记录问题，或填写此 Google 表单。"

regex.source: "label-donate-description":"If you find this plugin useful, and wish to support me financially, consider donating. Thank you!"
regex.target: "label-donate-description":"如果您觉得这个插件有用，并希望在经济上支持我，请考虑捐款。谢谢！"

regex.source: "label-examples-description":"Get inspired by these ready-to-go toolbar examples."
regex.target: "label-examples-description":"从这些现成的工具栏示例中获得灵感。"

regex.source: "label-feedback-description":"Use this Google form for any feedback, questions, or ideas you may have."
regex.target: "label-feedback-description":"请使用此 Google 表单提供任何反馈、问题或想法。"

regex.source: "label-support-description":"Visit the forums on GitHub to ask questions to the community."
regex.target: "label-support-description":"访问 GitHub 上的论坛，向社区提问。"

regex.source: "label-user-guide-description":"How to make the most out of the plugin, including tips and examples."
regex.target: "label-user-guide-description":"如何充分利用该插件，包括技巧和示例。"

regex.source: "label-preview-empty-no-items":"No items. Edit this toolbar to add items."
regex.target: "label-preview-empty-no-items":"没有项目。编辑此工具栏以添加项目。"

regex.source: "option-command-error-not-available-install":"This command is not available. Plugin must be installed and enabled."
regex.target: "option-command-error-not-available-install":"此命令不可用。插件必须安装并启用。"

regex.source: "option-command-error-not-available-search":"This command cannot be found. Try searching again."
regex.target: "option-command-error-not-available-search":"找不到此命令。请再次尝试搜索。"

regex.source: "option-file-error-does-not-exist":"This file or folder does not exist."
"option-item-group-help":"Select a toolbar to insert into this one."
regex.target: "option-item-group-help":"选择一个工具栏插入到此工具栏中。"

regex.source: "option-item-menu-help":"Select a toolbar to open as a menu."
regex.target: "option-item-menu-help":"选择一个工具栏作为菜单打开。"
"option-uri-help":"提示：在 URI 中使用笔记属性。"

regex.source: "name-with-count":"Items ({{count}})",description:"Add items to the toolbar, in order."
regex.target: "name-with-count":"项目 ({{count}})",description:"按顺序添加项目到工具栏。"

regex.source: "button-add-break-tooltip":"Add a line break to the toolbar"
"button-new-item-tooltip":"Add a new item to the toolbar"
description:"Notes in folders below will display the toolbar mapped to it. Precedence is top to bottom."
regex.target: description:"以下文件夹中的笔记将显示映射到它的工具栏。优先级是从上到下。"

regex.source: "label-empty":"Use the button to create a mapping."
"error-folder-already-mapped":"This folder already has a toolbar associated with it."
regex.target: "error-folder-already-mapped":"此文件夹已关联了一个工具栏。"

regex.source: description:"Give this toolbar a unique name."
regex.target: description:"为此工具栏设置一个唯一的名称。"

regex.source: "error-toolbar-already-exists":"A toolbar already exists with this name."
description:"Sets the icon for the floating button and navigation bar (on phone). Requires restart."
regex.target: description:"设置浮动按钮和导航栏（手机上）的图标。需要重启。"

regex.source: description:"Action to take when the ribbon icon (on phones) is used."
regex.target: description:"当手机上的丝带图标被使用时执行的操作。"

regex.source: description:"Adds item types for Dataview, JS Engine, and Templater, which must be installed and enabled."
regex.target: description:"为 Dataview、JS 引擎和 Templater 添加项目类型，这些插件必须安装并启用。"

regex.source: name:"Show 'Edit toolbar' link in toolbar menus \u{1F4F1}"
regex.target: name:"在工具栏菜单中显示 '编辑工具栏' 链接 \u{1F4F1}"

regex.source: description:"Adds an item to access the toolbar's settings in toolbars that are displayed as menus at the bottom of the screen on phones."
regex.target: description:"在手机屏幕上底部显示为菜单的工具栏中添加一个访问工具栏设置的项目。"

regex.source: "option-mobile-help":"Tip: Access toolbars from the navigation bar."
description:"List of styles to apply to the toolbar."
regex.target: description:"要应用到工具栏的样式列表。"

regex.source: help:"Customize even more with the Style Settings plugin."
regex.target: help:"使用样式设置插件进行更多自定义。"
"option-autohide-disclaimer":"自动隐藏在移动设备上不适用。"

regex.source: "option-nowrap-disclaimer":"Works best if items are not evenly spaced or centered."
regex.target: "option-nowrap-disclaimer":"如果项目不是均匀分布或居中，效果最佳。"

regex.source: "option-sticky-disclaimer":"Sticky does not apply in Reading mode."

regex.target: "option-default-description":"除非被覆盖，否则适用于所有平台。"

regex.source: "option-mobile-empty":"No mobile styles set. Using default styles."
regex.target: "option-mobile-empty":"未设置移动设备样式。使用默认样式。"
"style-tooltip-use-class":"在 Callout 或 CSS 中使用: {{class}}"

regex.source: description:"Define the toolbars you want to add to your notes."
regex.target: description:"定义您希望添加到笔记中的工具栏。"

regex.source: "label-empty-create-tbar":"Use the button to create a toolbar."
description:"This toolbar is used in {{mappingCount}} mapping(s) and {{itemCount}} toolbar item(s)."
regex.target: description:"此工具栏在 {{mappingCount}} 个映射和 {{itemCount}} 个工具栏项目中使用。"
title:"Note Toolbar 中有什么新功能？"

regex.source: "label-release-notes-description":"Detailed notes for the latest releases are on GitHub."
regex.target: "label-release-notes-description":"最新发行的详细说明在 GitHub 上。"
"label-roadmap":"Note Toolbar 的未来发展是什么？"

regex.source: "label-roadmap-description":"Check out the Roadmap to preview the features under consideration."
regex.target: "label-roadmap-description":"查看路线图以预览正在考虑的功能。"

regex.source: "label-share-description":"Share this link with another Note Toolbar user to add your toolbar to their vault."
regex.target: "label-share-description":"与另一位 Note Toolbar 用户分享此链接，以将您的工具栏添加到他们的库中。"

regex.source: "notice-completed":"Toolbar copied to clipboard as callout. Open settings to adjust formatting."
regex.target: "notice-completed":"工具栏已作为调用复制到剪贴板。打开设置以调整格式。"
"notice-shared":"Note Toolbar 链接已复制到剪贴板"

regex.source: "warning-share-menu":"This toolbar refers to at least one other toolbar that the recipient won't receive."
regex.target: "warning-share-menu":"此工具栏引用了至少一个接收者不会收到的其他工具栏。"

regex.source: "warning-share-length":"Some web browsers may not load a URL that is longer than 2,048 characters."
regex.target: "warning-share-length":"某些网页浏览器可能无法加载超过 2,048 个字符的 URL。"

regex.source: "option-uri-description":"Provides an obsidian:// link instead of an https:// URL."
regex.target: "option-uri-description":"提供 obsidian:// 链接而不是 https:// URL。"

regex.source: "label-import-confirmation":"Confirm you would like to add this toolbar. Once added, this toolbar will need to be mapped to one or more notes."
regex.target: "label-import-confirmation":"确认您希望添加此工具栏。添加后，此工具栏需要映射到一个或多个笔记。"

regex.source: "label-import":"Paste a Note Toolbar Callout below and it will be added as a new toolbar."
regex.target: "label-import":"在下面粘贴一个 Note Toolbar 调用，它将作为一个新的工具栏被添加。"

regex.source: "label-import-into":"Paste a Note Toolbar Callout below and its items will be added to this toolbar."
regex.target: "label-import-into":"在下面粘贴一个 Note Toolbar 调用，其项目将被添加到此工具栏中。"

regex.source: "label-import-into-help":"The callout heading is not needed, and will be ignored if provided."
regex.target: "label-import-into-help":"调用标题不是必需的，如果提供将被忽略。"

regex.source: "error-invalid-uri-content":"Note Toolbar: It looks like there's an issue with this link. Check the URI is correct, or review the user guide."
regex.target: "error-invalid-uri-content":"Note Toolbar: 此链接似乎有问题。请检查 URI 是否正确，或查阅用户指南。"

regex.source: "warning-invalid-plugins":"This toolbar uses plugins you do not have installed and enabled:"
regex.target: "warning-invalid-plugins":"此工具栏使用的插件未安装或启用："

regex.source: "warning-vars":"This toolbar uses variables, which you can modify to work with your vault."
regex.target: "warning-vars":"此工具栏使用变量，您可以修改这些变量以适应您的库。"

regex.source: "error-command-not-found":"Check Note Toolbar setting or URI for this command. Command not found: {{command}}"
regex.target: "error-command-not-found":"检查 Note Toolbar 设置或 URI 以查找此命令。未找到命令：{{command}}"

regex.source: "error-folder-not-found":"Check Note Toolbar setting or URI for this folder. Folder not found: {{folder}}"
regex.target: "error-folder-not-found":"检查 Note Toolbar 设置或 URI 以查找此文件夹。未找到文件夹：{{folder}}"

regex.source: "error-item-menu-not-found":"Check Note Toolbar setting or URI for this menu item. Toolbar not found: {{toolbar}}"
regex.target: "error-item-menu-not-found":"检查 Note Toolbar 设置或 URI 以查找此菜单项。未找到工具栏：{{toolbar}}"

regex.source: "error-scripting-not-enabled":"Enable Scripting in Note Toolbar settings to use this item."
regex.target: "error-scripting-not-enabled":"在 Note Toolbar 设置中启用脚本以使用此项目。"

regex.source: "error-scripting-plugin-not-enabled":"Toggle the Scripting setting after installing and enabling plugin: {{plugin}}"
regex.target: "error-scripting-plugin-not-enabled":"安装并启用插件后切换脚本设置：{{plugin}}"

regex.source: "error-toolbar-not-found":"Check Note Toolbar setting or URI for this toolbar. Toolbar not found: {{toolbar}}"
regex.target: "error-toolbar-not-found":"检查 Note Toolbar 设置或 URI 以查找此工具栏。未找到工具栏：{{toolbar}}"

regex.source: "error-uri-params-not-supported":"One or more of these Note Toolbar URI parameters is not supported: {{params}}"
regex.target: "error-uri-params-not-supported":"这些 Note Toolbar URI 参数中的一个或多个不受支持：{{params}}"

regex.source:
"warning-no-matching-toolbar":`No matching toolbar: {{toolbar}}
Click/Tap here to create it.`
regex.target:
"warning-no-matching-toolbar":`未找到匹配的工具栏：{{toolbar}}
点击/轻触此处以创建。`

regex.source: "args-description":"Arguments accepted by your script function, in comma-separated 'name: value' format."
regex.target: "args-description":"脚本函数接受的参数，以逗号分隔的 '名称: 值' 格式表示。"

regex.source: "outputcontainer-description":"Add a note-toolbar-output callout with a unique meta field to your note to put text output."
regex.target: "outputcontainer-description":"在笔记中添加一个带有唯一元字段的 note-toolbar-output 调用，以放置文本输出。"

"error-general":"Dataview error: Check console for more details.
```
{{error}}
```"

"exec-sourcefile-error-required":"错误：需要一个 JavaScript 文件"
